LanguageData.Shell_60mmMortar_ToxicGas.label: 60mm mortar shell (Toxic)
LanguageData.Shell_60mmMortar_ToxicGas.description: Low-velocity shell designed to be fired from a mortar.
LanguageData.Shell_60mmMortar_RageGas.label: 60mm mortar shell (Rage)
LanguageData.Shell_60mmMortar_RageGas.description: Low-velocity shell designed to be fired from a mortar.
LanguageData.Shell_60mmMortar_TearGas.label: 60mm mortar shell (Tear)
LanguageData.Shell_60mmMortar_TearGas.description: Low-velocity shell designed to be fired from a mortar.
LanguageData.Shell_60mmMortar_SleepGas.label: 60mm mortar shell (Sleep)
LanguageData.Shell_60mmMortar_SleepGas.description: Low-velocity shell designed to be fired from a mortar.
LanguageData.Shell_60mmMortar_FearGas.label: 60mm mortar shell (Fear)
LanguageData.Shell_60mmMortar_FearGas.description: Low-velocity shell designed to be fired from a mortar.
LanguageData.Shell_60mmMortar_AcidGas.label: 60mm mortar shell (Acid)
LanguageData.Shell_60mmMortar_AcidGas.description: Low-velocity shell designed to be fired from a mortar.
